name: Secretary — personal decision-aid app (this app)
next_move: Build the Temporal Continuity Ledger first (per Jake's build order 2026-04-22): _ledger/tcl/<YYYY-MM-DD>.json + per-day schema + Calendar view + grid-generator ingest. Start accumulating day entries immediately so real data exists by tomorrow. Streak Tracker lands on top of TCL; Ratio Lattice stub (schema + empty ledger + loader wiring) ships tonight in parallel.
blockers: North Star ledger has 14 anchors across 9 regimes; ratio_lattice ledger still empty — stub schema lands tonight per secretary_spec_ratio_lattice_ledger_stub, ratios Jake declares tomorrow
Voice model not yet loaded — blocks voice-audit sub-agent (see secretary_spec_sub_agent_fleet)
Decide if Preflection can be imported from Jake's existing stack rather than built from scratch
Streak-worthy flag convention on north_star anchors — provisionally added as boolean on each anchor; revisit at build time
TCL day-boundary semantics not decided: midnight local vs. 'until Jake ends the day'
21 specialist sub-agent specs from framework work — location unknown in current bedrock; need to pull into agents/ (see _OPEN_QUESTIONS 10.18)
Contact layer spec assumes people schema extension (last_contact, owed_response, relationship_weight, cadence) — Rodrigo + Andre retrofit done; other contacts still need population
live_band: 3x3 grid decision-aid with typed cells (candidate/hybrid/plus), fourfold-exit commit semantics. Orchestrator-as-stage-selector is the architecture claim. 10 consciousness modules mapped as architectural target from day one. Alignment claim: keep the model selecting within the live band of actions that advance declared North Stars under current regime and sore-thumbs, with typed abstention when the band goes empty. TCL gives the band a temporal dimension — today's proposals read yesterday's outcomes. Sub-agent fleet is the capability layer beneath the orchestrator; journal is the capture layer that feeds public-surface work; billing/contact/streak/ratio-lattice subsystems all surface through the same grid.
stage_inventory_open_threads: Formalize stage inventory as a typed registry (Preflection, sub-agent fan-out, sweep, reflect/re-grade, consult, audit, deliverable, shell, comparator re-score)
Both flagged in CLAUDE_NOTES session 1 as Open threads for Claude Code
Delegation mechanism and typed-abstention return type from sub-agents (secretary_spec_sub_agent_fleet)
notes: Jake's first serious attempt at consciousness-for-AI as a daily-use product. Rod is the sibling product that validated the UI discipline (two-mouse demo, grade+note, fourfold exit as UX). Secretary inherits the pattern and adds typed stage-selection as its distinguishing move. Session 1 notes in CLAUDE_NOTES.md are the substrate — ten modules, drift taxonomy, Preflection, Consult all documented there. 2026-04-22: Jake dropping ~100 feature specs tonight. Batch 1 (TCL + Streak + Ratio-Lattice-stub) = core data spine. Batch 3 (contact layer, sub-agent fleet, billing ledger, content journal) = four independent subsystems. Seven total specs drafted. More expected.
